creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
I really think we can close this PR.
 The pr author has identified that this is definitely not an mplayer
 bug. Maybe a small piece of sinister coding in libdvdcss or something,
 maybe not, but definitely not an mplayer problem and likely not even a
 gcc problem.
 
 Riggs
 
 -- 
 - Now the world has gone to bed  | Now I lay me down to sleep        -
 -- Darkness won't engulf my head | Try to count electric sheep      --
 --- I can see by infra-red       | Sweet dream wishes you can keep ---
 ---- How I hate the night        | How I hate the night           ----
